Package simpaths.experiment

Class SimPathsCollector

java.lang.Object
microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationManager
microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationCollectorManager
simpaths.experiment.SimPathsCollector
All Implemented Interfaces:
microsim.engine.SimulationCollectorManager, microsim.engine.SimulationManager, microsim.event.EventListener
public class SimPathsCollector extends microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationCollectorManager implements microsim.event.EventListener
CLASS TO MANAGE COLLECTION OF SIMULATED OUTPUT
